goal: Supabase/Postgres-backed multi-organization Orun SaaS control plane
notes: Task 0001, Task 0001.1, and Task 0002 are verified and merged.
The active spec direction now follows the Orun golden-path reference in specs/orun-golden-path.md.
aws-admin is the reference repo for Orun v2.1.0, Terraform component style, dev/stage/prod environments, S3 backend, and repo-scoped IAM roles.
Task 0003 aligns multi-tenant-saas Orun runtime, stack-tectonic Terraform behavior, component descriptors, READMEs, and CI/local kiox behavior with aws-admin.
Tasks 0004-0006 sequence aws-admin IAM access, S3 backend migration, and Supabase Terraform provisioning with AWS Secrets Manager.
